Vile Sarnak Brew  
 

Placeable
Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
MANA: +50 ENDUR: +50
SV COLD: +10
This is a miraculous drink!
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Vile Sarnak Brew
Placeable
Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
MANA: +50 ENDUR: +50
SV COLD: +10
This is a miraculous drink!
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:You could drink this for days!
Item Type:Drink
Drink Duration:Miraculous Drink(100)
Stackable:20
Merchant Value:0 pp 3 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Melany - Tunare
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-31 08:05:13
Page Updated:Thu May 16th, 2019

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Chardok
NPC Name
an Alchemist`s Acolyte


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Chardok


Uploaded May 16th, 2019 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Drop
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2006 at 8:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591827700645
Scholar
31 posts
Any drop information on this?
▲ Page top
About the brew..
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 1:03 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591770506979
4 posts
Greets, there appears to be some conflicting info on here about the brew, heres a few things about it.

It can not be auto drunk from the range slot. when you have this equiped in the range slot with no other drink in your invintory, you get the "you are out of drink message" so you do not have to worry about force drinking as it will drink from your invintory and not your range slot.

You only recive the effect (50mana 10svc) when equiped in the range slot, haveing this in your first food/water slot will not get you the effect (you can look at your svc to check) so haveing more then one (ie one in range and 1 in invintory can't be used to stack the effect)

Stacking them has no effect (not surprized)

This dropped from the alchemist acrolyte outside the herbalist hut (hut where the grand herbalist spawns)

Safe hunting,

▲ Page top
RE: About the brew..
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2005 at 1:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1652660341379
758 posts
According to a Magelo toon I just looked at, it shows stats in the Inventory slot (looking at Mod1 - mana it shows 50 for the brew). Not sure if that is a glitch on Magelo's part or if they changed it...

Here is the link: http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=570196
▲ Page top
Still need water
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 10:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767211061
View User Forum
110 posts
Even if this does last forever, you'll still want to keep a stack (at least two flasks) of water or something in your inventory. Otherwise you'll still get the "You are low on water" message. :)
▲ Page top
ranged slot
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 8:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248758846
View User Forum
161 posts
Unless you already have something in your ranged slot this also goes in the ranged slot...So if you do have to go afk for a long period of time for some reason just pop this in your ranged slot and you wont have to worry about it being consumed..well good hunting and safe journey to all
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 25 2001 at 5:35 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) OK SO YOU KEEP THIS IN THE TOP SLOT OF YOUR INVENTORY AND KEEP TOPPED OFF WITH ORDINARY DRINK TO MAKE THIS EFFECT CONTINUOUS AND NEVER RUN OUT. IT WORKS
flavor?
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 8:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758444600
View User Forum
159 posts
i wonder what it tastes like....
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 24 2001 at 6:54 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 3 Stone?! A stack of these would makes most casters immbobile. (3*20=60 for those w/o calculators at hand.)
RE: Weight!
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 6:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756600730
103 posts
Dude.. if you stack something then the weight doesn't add up! 20 of these in a stack would be = to 3 stone
▲ Page top
RE: Weight!
QuoteReply
# May 17 2002 at 9:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756918651
99 posts
What's this "stone" business? One stone weights 14 pounds. I'll believe a 3-pound bottle, but not a 42-pound bottle.

I think wt 1.0 = one pound.

I'm a human cleric, lugging around 97 wt. of gear. I can't believe that weights 97 x 14 = 1,358 pounds.

Forthoffer, 60 cleric
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 24 2001 at 6:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i hope u pay no more than about 10pp for this - as i have seen many diff ppl fall asleep at the KB. i just know im gonna hear abotu someone paying 200pp and get pissed cuz they fell asleep or had to make an emergency AFK (hopefully in safe spot)
Miraculous drink...
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 4:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966037382
69 posts
Take for example fish rolls. You might be too full to eat a fish roll, but be hungry enough to eat two or three foraged vegitables ("snack size"). Keeping this in mind, it wouldnt be too increadibly hard to keep from drinking this item from the range slot.

Just a pointer for those who might be afraid to get one because of the chance to drink it. Good luck!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 25 2001 at 10:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) all the standard forages are "meals", including veggies
RE: Miraculous drink...
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 1:15 PM Rating: Decent
Kilraa
99 posts
Actually when I foraged veggies with my iksar yesterday, it said that the veggies were a snack. You can eat them like regular meals, you just got thru them faster.

# Oct 24 2001 at 4:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756758585
43 posts
I'm guessing here but could Miraculous mean it never runs out?
▲ Page top
RE: Miraculous?
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 7:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247288785
26 posts

A Person I know has one and hasn't use it up yet in almost 2 weeks. It's been in the range slot the hole time.... Worth a pretty penny never to have to buy Water again, not to mention the 50 mana and the 10 SVC. Real neat and different Item.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 24 2001 at 4:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Saw someone trying to sell one of these in OT. Didn't check on price but he wasn't auctioning very long so he must have sold.
This is a neat item
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 4:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250648645
36 posts
probably not because +1000 mana and +200 Cold Resist probably wouldnt stack , i wish it did though /drool
▲ Page top
This is a neat item
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 3:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750246078
Scholar
312 posts
Can it be consumed while equiped in the range slot? Can you stack them for additive stat bonuses?
▲ Page top
RE: This is a neat item
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 4:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246460789
View User Forum
513 posts
1) Yes, it can be consumed while equiped in the Range slot. It becomes the first thing you drink, so be sure to force-feed yourself water, etc. every once in awhile.
2) No, a stack of them will not give you a stacked bonus... just like Stat food.
3) Yes, it must be equipped in the Range slot to give the stat bonus.

Hope this helps.
▲ Page top
RE: This is a neat item
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 5:23 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757924826
Scholar
16 posts
uhm no it actually can not be consumed in the range slot. I am currently using a sandwich of foul smelling herbs(sta 5 hp 50) and even when im out of food i dont eat it.
